domain: dental lab equipment, orthodontic bench fixtures, non-clinical prosthetic fabrication aids, and sterilization tray hardware

ideas.product_context: Dental lab bench setup for holding articulator frames during setup and inspection.
ideas.core_function: Stabilizes an articulator while allowing repeatable viewing and adjustment access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Angled support cradle with indexed locating features
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines sloped rests, asymmetric stops, shallow pockets, and clearance cutouts that challenge feature hierarchy without needing exact dimensions.

ideas.product_context: Non-clinical prosthetic fabrication aid for shaping occlusal wax rims on the bench.
ideas.core_function: Guides wax into consistent curved profiles while keeping excess material contained.
ideas.likely_main_part: Contoured forming block with channel and overflow lip
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests representation of smooth troughs, raised lips, tapered entry zones, and transitions between flat handling areas and organic guide surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic lab bench fixture used to organize and guide manual forming of appliance wires.
ideas.core_function: Provides repeatable bend reference paths and grip points for wire shaping.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved guide plate with removable peg locations
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Stresses arrays of small locating holes, curved guide rails, relief notches, and a surface layout that is functional but not purely rectangular.

ideas.product_context: Bench aid for trimming and finishing removable orthodontic retainers away from patient contact.
ideas.core_function: Holds acrylic appliances securely while exposing edge regions for rotary finishing.
ideas.likely_main_part: Soft-contour nest with clamp bridge
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested cavities, protective rounded contact regions, bridge clearance, and ergonomic access openings around an irregular workpiece.

ideas.product_context: Dental prosthetic fabrication bench organizer for arranging artificial teeth during setup.
ideas.core_function: Separates tooth components by position while keeping labels and picks visible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compartment tray with curved labeled recesses
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests shallow pocket repetition, nonuniform compartment shapes, label panels, and scoopable edges within one molded tray concept.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab equipment accessory for supporting restorations before furnace handling.
ideas.core_function: Keeps small crown forms elevated and spaced for coating or drying workflows.
ideas.likely_main_part: Perforated rack plate with raised support bosses
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with dense perforations, low-height standoffs, filleted boss bases, and the need to distinguish structural plate from delicate supports.

ideas.product_context: Non-clinical dental model fabrication station for managing model analog components.
ideas.core_function: Stores small analog parts upright and groups them by case during bench work.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped organizer block with varied socket profiles
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes circular, keyed, and slotted receptacles on stepped terraces, testing semantic recognition of part-specific sockets.

ideas.product_context: Sterilization tray hardware for securing instrument cassette lids during handling.
ideas.core_function: Provides a spring-compatible latch surface and visual locked orientation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat latch plate with hook nose and thumb tab
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes thin sheet geometry, folded-like hooks, embossed direction cues, and contact clearances that are subtle but functionally important.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab sterilization tray insert for holding rotary burs through cleaning cycles.
ideas.core_function: Keeps bur shanks separated and accessible while allowing fluid drainage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Perforated insert block with drainage underside
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated small bores, countersunk approach features, underside channels, and the distinction between storage holes and fluid paths.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic bench fixture for staging bracket sets during appliance preparation.
ideas.core_function: Presents bracket groups in a stable layout with pickup access for tweezers.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low profile board with angled wells and pickup grooves
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires many tiny tilted recesses, fine access grooves, side labels, and a board geometry that must remain readable at small feature scale.

ideas.product_context: Dental model fabrication aid for preparing removable die bases on the lab bench.
ideas.core_function: Aligns drill approach positions relative to a plaster model base.
ideas.likely_main_part: Adjustable guide rail with sliding drill bushings
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines rail slots, sliding collars, bushing holes, clamp pads, and positional logic that tests assembly-like interpretation in a single concept.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic lab equipment accessory for thermoforming retainer sheets over models.
ideas.core_function: Holds thermoplastic sheet edges evenly before forming.
ideas.likely_main_part: Open clamp frame with hinged edge bars
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin frame loops, hinge knuckles, latch tabs, compression surfaces, and a large central void that must be preserved.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab bench storage for air drying cast models after trimming or washing.
ideas.core_function: Supports models at a slight incline while allowing airflow and drip clearance.
ideas.likely_main_part: Slotted angled shelf with raised stops
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves repeated angled slots, drainage gaps, raised end stops, and load-bearing ribs that create a layered functional surface.

ideas.product_context: Prosthetic fabrication aid for positioning denture flasks during packing preparation.
ideas.core_function: Keeps flask halves aligned and separated during staging.
ideas.likely_main_part: Heavy cradle base with opposing contour blocks
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges modeling of opposing curved supports, broad stability feet, relief pockets, and robust contact regions for a heavy lab item.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab casting prep accessory used before investment workflows.
ideas.core_function: Holds wax sprue assemblies upright without deforming delicate branches.
ideas.likely_main_part: Upright post stand with radial clamp arms
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial organization, slender supports, gentle clamp jaws, and clearance envelopes around fragile tree-like workpieces.

ideas.product_context: Sterilization tray hardware added to reduce denting and improve stacking behavior.
ideas.core_function: Protects tray corners while creating a stable nesting interface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clip-on corner cap with internal ribs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires an L-shaped shell, snap lips, internal ribbing, rounded outside edges, and subtle undercuts for retention.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab bench fixture for setting down rotary handpieces during prosthetic finishing.
ideas.core_function: Keeps the handpiece from rolling while protecting the working bit from contact.
ideas.likely_main_part: Saddle rest with raised bit clearance tunnel
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines cylindrical cradle surfaces, tunnel-like clearance, anti-roll feet, and a compact ergonomic form with multiple tangent transitions.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic lab bench organizer for elastics and small appliance consumables.
ideas.core_function: Separates small elastics into accessible compartments with a rotating presentation surface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular tray body with partitioned wells
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial partitions, shallow scoop wells, central bearing boss, and lid alignment features without relying on rectangular repetition.

ideas.product_context: Dental prosthetic bench aid for trimming provisional crown shells outside clinical use.
ideas.core_function: Holds thin shell forms from the inside while leaving margins exposed.
ideas.likely_main_part: Expandable mandrel with tapered support petals
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires tapered petal geometry, split expansion gaps, smooth internal support surfaces, and clear distinction between flexible and rigid-looking features.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab equipment accessory for supporting zirconia parts in a bead medium.
ideas.core_function: Contains support beads while allowing easy retrieval of small restorations.
ideas.likely_main_part: Shallow refractory dish with textured retrieval ramp
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes a bowl-like cavity, low retaining wall, textured ramp, and small pour relief, challenging surface and feature intent.

ideas.product_context: Non-clinical bench fixture for stabilizing impression trays during lab-side repair or modification.
ideas.core_function: Holds curved tray handles and rims in a fixed orientation for adhesive work.
ideas.likely_main_part: Curved jaw clamp with handle notch
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests opposing concave jaws, notched handle clearance, screw boss placement, and the need to represent gripping without excessive detail.

ideas.product_context: Sterilization tray hardware for separating wrapped small dental instruments inside a tray.
ideas.core_function: Creates removable partitions that hold packs upright and visible.
ideas.likely_main_part: Snap-in divider rail with sliding partition tabs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines long rail channels, clip feet, adjustable tab geometry, and repeated but repositionable partition features.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab setup aid for checking model orientation during prosthetic planning.
ideas.core_function: Provides a visual reference surface and adjustable model support points.
ideas.likely_main_part: Flat reference plate with leveling pads and sight grooves
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests planar datum expression, embedded sight grooves, adjustable pad sockets, and the relationship between visual alignment features and support features.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic bench fixture for holding appliance wires and bands during solder preparation.
ideas.core_function: Locks small parts in a repeatable relationship while keeping joint areas exposed.
ideas.likely_main_part: Heat-resistant jig block with pin slots and clamp fingers
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires mixed straight and curved slots, finger clamps, heat relief areas, and open access around intersecting wire paths.

ideas.product_context: Prosthetic fabrication bench aid for supporting denture bases during finishing.
ideas.core_function: Cradles a denture base while exposing outer surfaces for polishing access.
ideas.likely_main_part: Padded cradle form with rocking lock foot
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD with broad organic support contours, replaceable pad regions, underside stabilizer features, and asymmetric access cutaways.

ideas.product_context: Sterilization tray hardware for improving grip on hot or gloved tray handling.
ideas.core_function: Adds a removable grip interface to a metal tray rim.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clip-on handle sleeve with insulated grip ribs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin rim capture geometry, ribbed grip texture, snap retention lips, and a part that must read as both sleeve and handle.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab bench fixture for rotating small restorations during visual inspection.
ideas.core_function: Lets a technician turn a crown shell smoothly while keeping it centered.
ideas.likely_main_part: Low rotary puck with interchangeable crown nest
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines circular bearing-like layers, shallow interchangeable inserts, centering cones, and finger scallops in a compact assembly.

ideas.product_context: Dental lab bench accessory for stabilizing mixing bowls during material preparation outside the operatory.
ideas.core_function: Prevents bowl slip while leaving the rim accessible for spatula movement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Weighted ring base with flexible grip pads
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires annular geometry, segmented pads, raised anti-slip texture, and open access around a nested bowl without modeling the bowl itself.

ideas.product_context: Sterilization tray hardware for holding a mesh lid down during washing and transfer.
ideas.core_function: Secures a removable perforated lid with accessible release tabs.
ideas.likely_main_part: Edge retainer clip with dual spring tabs
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests thin clip geometry, spring-tab relief gaps, hook engagement surfaces, and repeated perforation-clearance features near the tray edge.

ideas.product_context: Orthodontic lab bench aid for arranging expansion screw components before embedding in appliances.
ideas.core_function: Holds small screw bodies and arms in the desired orientation during setup.
ideas.likely_main_part: Alignment block with keyed central pocket and arm grooves
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines keyed recesses, narrow grooves, orientation arrows, and clampable side reliefs that test fine mechanical feature intent.
